Quote: The proper function of man is to live, not to exist. I shall not waste my days in trying to prolong them. I shall use my time.
Author: Jack London

Quote: Death is but crossing the world, as friends do the seas; they live in one another still. For they must needs be present, that love and live in that which is omnipresent. In this divine glass, they see face to face; and their converse is free as well as pure. This is the comfort of friends, that though they may be said to die, yet their friendship and society are, in the best sense, ever present, because immortal.
Author: William Penn

Quote: We are closer to God when we are asking questions than when we think we have the answers.
Author: Abraham Joshua Heschel

Quote: Time is free, but it's priceless. You can't own it, but you can use it. You can't keep it, but you can spend it. Once you've lost it you can never get it back.
Author: Harvey MacKay

Quote: “A friend loves at all times, and a brother is born for adversity.”
Author: King Solomon, Proverbs 17:17

Quote: "Have I not commanded you? Be strong and courageous. Do not be afraid; do not be discouraged, for the Lord your God will be with you wherever you go."
Author: Joshua 1:9

Quote: A wave can kill you. Or you can ride it. It’s sometimes more dangerous to shy away. You can’t live your life in fear. You have to be prepared to get on your board and stand on your feet.
Author: Matt Haig

Quote: He who fears he shall suffer, already suffers what he fears.
Author: Michel de Montaigne

Quote: Then He arose and rebuked the wind and said to the sea, “Peace! Be still!” And the wind ceased and there was great calm.
Author: Mark 4:39

Quote: I think we should follow a simple rule: if we can take the worst, take the risk.
Author: Dr. Joyce Brothers

Quote: Whatever your hand finds to do, do it with all your might.
Author: Ecclesiastes 9:10

Quote:
But those who trust in the Lord will find new
strength.
They will soar high on wings like eagles.
They will run and not grow weary.
They will walk and not faint.
Author: Isaiah 40:31

Quote:
The time will come
when, with elation,
you will greet yourself arriving
at your own door, in your own mirror
and each will smile at the other’s welcome,

and say, sit here. Eat.
You will love again the stranger who was your self.
Give wine. Give bread, Give back your heart
to itself, to the stranger who has loved you

all your life, whom you ignored
for another, who knows you by heart.
Take down the love letters from the bookshelf

the photographs, the desperate notes,
peel your own image from the mirror.
Sit. Feast on your life.
Author: Derek Walcott

Quote:
Fix your mind upon its object. 
Hold to this, unswerving,
Disowning fear and hope,
Advance only upon this goal.
Author: Arjun’s divine instruction

Quote:
Presence of mind, and courage in distress, 
Are more than armies to procure success.
Author: John Dryden

Quote:
you can’t make homes out of human beings  someone should have already told you that  
and if he wants to leave 
then let him leave
 you are terrifying 
and strange and beautiful 
something not everyone knows how to love.
Author: Warsan Shire
Source (book, movie, person, poem, etc): For Women Who Are Difficult to Love

Quote: Ah, but a man's reach should exceed his grasp, or what's a heaven for?
Author: Robert Browning

Quote: No matter how love-sick a woman is, she shouldn't take the first pill that comes along.
Author: Dr. Joyce Brothers

Quote: Whoever restrains his words has knowledge, and he who has a cool spirit is a man of understanding.
Author: King Solomon, Proverbs 17:27

Quote: Listening, not imitation, may be the sincerest form of flattery.
Author: Dr. Joyce Brothers

Quote: Knowledge is finite. Wonder is infinite.
Author: Matt Haig

Quote: Yea, and if some god shall wreck me in the wine-dark deep, even so I will endure... For already have I suffered full much, and much have I toiled in perils of waves and war. Let this be added to the tale of those.
Author: Homer

Quote: The world is too much with us.
Author: William Wordsworth
Source (book, movie, person, poem, etc): Sonnet: The World is too much with us

Quote: Don’t aim for perfection. Evolution, and life, only happen through mistakes.
Author: Matt Haig

Quote: For even the Son of Man came not to be served but to serve, and to give his life as a ransom for many.
Author: Mark 10:45

Quote: For the ways are many, but death is one. Wherefore then should you be afraid?
Author: Not sure

Quote: It’s not “how do I feel about them?” it’s “how do they make me feel?”
Author: Matthew Hussey

Quote:
The more you give, the more you get.
The more you laugh, the less you fret.
The more you do unselfishly, The more you live abundantly.
The more of everything you share, The more you'll always have to spare.
The more you love, the more you'll find 
That life is good and friends are kind.
For only what we give away, 
Enriches us from day to day.
Author: Helen Steiner Rice

Quote: There is no happiness like that of being loved by your fellow creatures, and feeling that your presence is an addition to their comfort.
Author: Charlotte Brontë

Quote: Time heals everything. I don’t need anything. Hallelujah.
Author: Beyoncé

Quote: Faith is the assurance of things hoped for, the conviction of things not seen. -Hebrews II
Author: Bible
Source (book, movie, person, poem, etc): Paul's second letter to the Hebrews

Quote: When I look at myself in the mirror, I thank God the same old jerk is still staring back at me.
Author: Roberto Canessa

Quote: “There are years that ask questions, and years that answer.”
Author: Zora Neale Hurston

Quote: An envious heart makes a treacherous ear.
Author: Zora Neale Hurston

Quote: I’ll tell you this: The braver I am, the luckier I get.
Author: Glennon Doyle

Quote: Whimsy goes with everything.
Author: Kirk Gleason

Quote: I was in my early thirties when I began, literally, to wake up to questions about my vocation. By all appearances things were going well, but the soul doesn’t put much stock in appearances
Author: Parker Palmer

Quote:
I have plowed my life this way 
Turned over a whole history
Looking for the roots of what went wrong
….Enough
…I plowed to unearth last year’s reasons - The farmer plows to plant a greening season
Author: Parker Palmer

Quote: If equal affection cannot be, let the more loving one be me.
Author: Dolly Alderton

Quote: The best things that I have experienced in life, I have had to wait for, and not comfortably.
Author: Unknown

Quote: Let it be said that I am right rather than consistent.
Author: Justice Marshall Harlan

Quote: Mood follows action. Just do the thing.
Author: Shalane Flanagan
Source (book, movie, person, poem, etc): We Can Do Hard Things Podcast

Quote: Love aint somethin’ lak uh grindstone dat’s de same thing everywhere and do de same thing tuh everything it touch. Love is lak de sea. It’s uh movin’ thing, but still and all, it takes its shape from de shore it meets, and it’s different with every shore.
Author: Zora Neale Hurston

Quote: Most people are only as needy as their unmet needs. When their emotional needs are met, and the earlier the better, they usually turn their attention outward.
Author: Amir Levine & Rachel Heller

Quote: Breathe out, then in. Find the self, then lose it once again.
Author: Darrow

Quote: Gather yourself. Every morning. As soon as you wake up. Embrace who you are before the world can get in the way.
Author: Chani Nichols

Quote: Our idea of God tells us more about ourselves than about Him.
Author: Thomas Merton

Quote: You create your own luck.
Fake it till you make it.
Life begins outside of your comfort zone.
Author: Neale Donald Walsch

Quote: Listen with the same passion of wanting to be heard.
Author: Brene Brown

Quote: Pay attention to who you are with when you feel your best.
Author: Brene Brown

Quote: Choose discomfort over resentment.
Author: Brene Brown

Quote: Don’t compare your insides with someone else’s outside.
Author: Anne Lamott

Quote: Handsome is as handsome does.
Author: MTGS

Quote: Love the thing that loves you back.
Author: Dr. Daniel Amen

Quote: Comparison is the thief of joy.
Author: Theodore Roosevelt

Quote: But sometimes I think we choose our illnesses, because they benefit us in some way.
Author: Tara Westover

Quote: I would rather live a life of 'oh wells' than a life of 'what ifs'.
Author: Pat Flynn

Quote: If we only wanted to be happy, it would be easy; but we want to be happier than other people, which is almost always difficult, since we think them happier than they are.
Author: Charles de Montesquieu

Quote: Everything you see or hear or experience in any way at all is specific to you. You create a universe by perceiving it, so everything in the universe you perceive is specific to you.
Author: Douglas Adams
Source (book, movie, person, poem, etc): The Ultimate Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy

Quote: Respect yourself enough to walk away from anything that no longer serves you, grows you, or makes you happy.
Author: Robert Tew

Quote: It does not do to dwell on dreams and forget to live.
Author: Dumbledor

Quote: People like to feel important. Make them feel important and they’ll appreciate you.
Author: Dale Carnegie

Quote: A healthy man wants a thousand things a sick man only wants one.
Author: Confucius

Quote: Life is what happens when you’re busy making plans.
Author: John Lennon

Quote: The only way out is through.
Author: Robert Frost

Quote: The popular belief isn’t always the correct one.
You’re your problem, but you’re also your solution.
The worst decision is indecision.
I fear not the man who has practiced 10,000 kicks once, but I fear the man who has practiced one kick 10,000 times.
Author: Bruce Lee

Quote: Hard work will open every door infront of you. But you will not be in front of every door.
Go further, go farther, if not why bother?
Author: Jay Z

Quote: Doubt kills more dreams than failure ever will.
Author: Suzy Kassem

Quote: Everyone has a plan until they get punched in the face.
Author: Mike Tyson

Quote: You teach people how to treat you.
Author: Dr. Phil

Quote: You cannot consider the measure of something without considering the measurer first.
Face what you’re afraid of and you’ll be free.
Author: Jordan Peterson

Quote: Bravery is better than safety.
Author: Jordan Peterson

Quote: If you are surrounded by people who are dull, try listening more.
Author: Jordan Peterson

Quote: Things you regret the most are things you value the most.
When in doubt always reach out.
The way we describe our experience becomes the memory.
The harder you work the luckier you get.
Author: Samuel Goldwyn

Quote: A bend in the road is not the end of the road.
Author: Helen Keller

Quote: You can walk through life much easier with a smile on your face.
Author: Phyllis Diller

Quote: Luck is the residue of design.
Author: Branch Ricky

Quote: O God and Heavenly Father, Grant to us the serenity of mind to accept that which cannot be changed; courage to change that which can be changed, and wisdom to know the one from the other, through Jesus Christ our Lord, Amen.
Author: Serenity Prayer

Quote: All we have to decide is what to do with the time that is given us.
Author: Gandalf

Quote: Luxuries can often times become necessities.
Author: Yuval Noah Harari

Quote: End? No, the journey doesn't end here. Death is just another path, one that we all must take. The grey rain-curtain of this world rolls back, and all turns to silver glass, and then you see it.
Author: Gandalf

Quote: It is difficult to get a man to understand something when his salary depends on his not understanding it.
Author: Upton Sinclair

Quote: A good leader takes a little more than his share of the blame, a little less than his share of the credit.
Author: Arnold H. Glasow

Quote: You are not a failure until you start blaming others for your mistakes.
Author: John Wooden

Quote: Biology enables, culture forbids.
Author: Yuval Noah Harari

Quote: Always maintain a healthy skepticism for anyone claiming to be authority, at least till they prove themselves capable.
But in the end, it’s only a passing thing, this shadow. Even darkness must pass. A new day will come. And when the sun shines it will shine out the clearer.
Author: Samwise Gamgee

Quote: The key to a successful leader is to earn respect for character, not rank.
Author: Dick Winters

Quote: Do you want to walk around all day knowing that you could but you didn’t?
Author: David Goggins

Quote: There’s only one standard. Your own.
There’s a difference between fear and losing your nerve.
I know that I don’t know.
Author: Socrates

Quote: A spouse is not a destination but a fellow traveler.
Author: Sadhguru

Quote: Luck is when preparation and opportunity meet.
Author: Seneca

Quote: The devil you know is better than the devil you don’t.
Everybody is a hero in their own story.
Author: John Barth

Quote: I try very hard not to take things personal that I don't think are meant to be personal.
Author: Tim Cook

Quote: If you can’t make a decision, go with your first choice. If you still don’t know, the answer is no.
Author: RJS

Quote: It is our choices...that show what we truly are, far more than our abilities.
Author: Dumbledore

Quote: Without the rain there is no beauty in the summer. Rain gives depth, it gives beauty, and it gives roots. If a plant is only exposed to sun and no rain, it becomes dry, flimsy, and dead. Too many times we curse the rain in our lives-suffering, trials, hardships-but the truth is without rain nothing grows.
Author: Jefferson Bethke

Quote: Be loyal to what matters.
Author: Arthur Morgan

Quote: If you want success, work like you’re broke.
Author: Tyler Perry

Quote: Study while others are sleeping; work while others are loafing; prepare while others are playing; and dream while others are wishing.
Author: William A. Ward

Quote: Nothing ventured nothing gained.
Author: Geoffrey Chaucer

Quote: May you live in interesting times.

Conserve your forces and energies by keeping them concentrated at their strongest point. You gain more by finding a rich mine and mining it deeper, than by flitting from one shallow mine to another — intensity defeats extensity every time.
Author: Robert Greene

Quote: If you play silly games you will win silly prizes.
Silence breeds whispers.
In business output matters more than input.
Take the word fair out of your vocabulary. Then you will be free.
It is possible to commit no mistakes and still lose. That is not a weakness. That is life.
Opportunity is not a lengthy visitor.
Author: Stephen Sondheim

Quote: If I’m not for myself, who will be? If I’m only for myself, what am I?
Knowledge isn’t power until it is applied.
Author: Dale Carnegie

Quote: The opposite of love is not hate, it's indifference.
Author: Elie Wiesel

Quote: The very wind that seeks to blow out a fire may cause it to spread.
It’s hard to hate up close.
Author: Michelle Obama

Quote: You can lead a horse to water but you can’t make it drink.
A wise man will make more opportunities than he finds.
Author: Sir Francis Bacon

Quote: Happiness is a choice that requires effort at times.
Author: Aeschylus

Quote: Don’t fear nothin' but don’t be no fool.
The learn-it-all will always do better than the know-it all.
We judge ourselves by our intentions and others by their behaviour.
Author: Stephen M.R. Covey

Quote: Hero worship might make Americans forget that laws mattered more than men.
Author: Calvin Coolidge

Quote: Winning is easy. It’s the struggle that defines the man.
Author: Ron Howard

Quote: Words are wind.
Author: George R.R. Martin

Quote: Lust looks like love until it’s time to sacrifice.
Author: Pastor Mike McClure Jr.

Quote: Fools talk, cowards are silent, wise men listen.
It is our choices that show what we truly are, far more than our abilities.
Author: J.K. Rowling
Source (book, movie, person, poem, etc): Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets

Quote: First thing you need to ask yourself about criticism is “is it fair?”
Author: Dr J

Quote: Begin with the end in mind.
Author: Stephen M.R. Covey

Quote: What would you attempt to do if you knew you could not fail?
Author: Robert Schuller

Quote: Let your energy impact the people you’re talking to, as opposed to the other way around.
Author: Will Guidara

Quote: Every battle is won or lost before it is ever fought.
Author: Sun Tzu

Quote: Plan like a pessimist and dream like an optimist.
Author: Bill Gates

Quote: Nothing in the world can take the place of persistence. Talent will not; nothing is more common than unsuccessful men with talent. Genius will not; unrewarded genius is almost a proverb. Education will not; the world is full of educated derelicts.
Author: Calvin Coolidge

Quote: What would you attempt to do if you knew you could not fail?
Author: Robert H. Schuller

Quote: A comfort zone is a beautiful place – but nothing ever grows there.
Author: John Assaraf

Quote: Creativity is an active process, not a passive one.
Author: Will Guidara

Quote: Start with what you want to achieve, instead of limiting yourself to what’s realistic or sustainable.
Author: Will Guidara

Quote: Your new life will cost you your old one.
Author: Brianna Wiest

Quote: Star in your role.
There’s no great loss without some small gain.
Author: Laura Ingalls Wilder

Quote: If it doesn't challenge you, it won't change you.
Author: Fred DeVito

Quote: It takes all kinds to make a world.
Author: Miguel de Cervantes

Quote: There’s a lid for every pot.
There’s only one standard. Your own.
Well done is better than well said.
Author: Benjamin Franklin

Quote: It generally feels better to run toward something than to run away from something. Focus on what is pulling you in, not what you're trying to avoid.
Author: James Clear

Quote: When you’re in the monkey house for too long you stop smelling the shit.
Not every challenge is trauma.
Sometimes life gives you what you need not what you want.
I’m going to support you in your failure as much as your success.
The stock market is a device for transferring money from the impatient to the patient.
Author: Warren Buffet

Quote: To know thyself is the beginning of wisdom.
Author: Socrates

Quote: Constant vigilance.
Author: J.K. Rowling
Source (book, movie, person, poem, etc): Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire

Quote: Where you go I will go, and where you stay I will stay. Your people will be my people and your God my God. Where you die I will die, and there I will be buried. May the LORD deal with me, be it ever so severely, if even death separates you and me.
Author: Ruth 1:16-17

Quote: Business is a matter of human service.
Author: MS Hershey

Quote: Know your way out before you go in.
Impatients kills progress.
Author: Ken Burns

Quote: Real Gs move in silence like lasagna.
Author: Lil Wayne

Quote: It is not the answers you bring back that matter, it is the person that you become while seeking them.
Author: Joseph Campbell

Quote: My mission in life is not merely to survive, but to thrive.
Author: Maya Angelou

Quote: I can never be all the people I want and live all the lives I want. I can never train myself in all the skills I want. And why do I want? I want to live and feel all the shades, tones and variations of mental and physical experience possible in my life.
Author: Sylvia Plath

Quote: You only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough.
Author: Mae West

Quote: We must laugh at man to avoid crying for him.
Author: Napoleon Bonaparte

Quote: It’s true, of course, that, in the long run, the scoreboard for investment decisions is market price. But prices will be determined by future earnings. In investing, just as in baseball, to put runs on the scoreboard one must watch the playing field, not the scoreboard.
Author: Warren Buffet

Quote: Great minds discuss ideas; average minds discuss events; small minds discuss people.
Author: Eleanor Roosevelt

Quote: I consider my ability to arouse enthusiasm among my people the greatest asset I possess, and the way to develop the best that is in a person is by appreciation and encouragement.
Author: Charles Schwab

Quote: He that has once done you a Kindness will be more ready to do you another, than he whom you yourself have obliged.
Author: Benjamin Franklin

Quote: I shall pass this way but once; any good that I can do or any kindness I can show to any human being; let me do it now. Let me not defer nor neglect it, for I shall not pass this way again.
Author: Etienne de Grellet

Quote: Everyone likes a compliment.
Author: Abraham Lincoln

Quote: You can make more friends in two months by becoming interested in other people than you can in two years by trying to get other people interested in you.
Author: Dale Carnegie

Quote: The expression one wears on one's face is far more important than the clothes one wears on one's back.
Author: Dale Carnegie

Quote: Belief is not a matter of choice, but conviction.
Author: Unknown

Quote: A plan is only as good as those who see it through.
The best confidence builder is experience.
Ignore your instincts at your peril.
Fail with honor rather than succeed by fraud.
It is a rough road that leads to the heights of greatness.
Sometimes, accepting help is harder than offering it.
Who's the more foolish, the fool or the fool who follows him?
Humility is the only defense against humiliation.
It's hard to be hungry when you have.
Author: Michael Jordan

Quote: You can catch more flies with a drop of honey than a bucket of gall.
Author: Abraham Lincoln

Quote: I have no right to say or do anything that diminishes a man in his own eyes. What matters is not what I think of him, but what he thinks of himself. Hurting a man in his dignity is a crime.
Author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry

Quote: Man is condemned to be free; because once thrown into the world, he is responsible for everything he does. It is up to you to give [life] a meaning.
Author: Jean-Paul Sartre

Quote: Never doubt that a small group of thoughtful, committed citizens can change the world; indeed, it's the only thing that ever has.
Author: Margaret Mead

Quote: May the worst days of your future be better than the best days of your past.
Author: David Leadbeater

Quote: The optimist invents the aeroplane, the pessimist the parachute.
Author: George Bernard

Quote: It is difficult to get a man to understand something, when his salary depends on his not understanding it.
Author: Upton Sinclair

Quote: We are on earth to take care of life. We are on earth to take care of each other.
Author: Xiye Bastida

Quote: A reader lives a thousand lives before he dies... The man who never reads lives only one.
Author: George RR Martin
